data.body: 2bbd oracle contract: authoritative source is the reviewed ticket plan and delivered PlanValidityProfile.CLOSE contract; production paths are close_plan_review_gate_check, public transition close, and txn.transition_core; unit plus real temporary-store lifecycle tiers are required because the policy crosses config/signature/validity and the transaction lock; exact postconditions are preserved validity verdicts, review-plan remediation, unchanged in_progress state, and zero STATUS append on locked rejection; controls are disabled/exempt/force/omitted-callback paths; gate is make test. RED evidence: 21 new-behavior failures for missing close_plan_review_gate_check/pre_status_check/wiring, all for the intended absent behavior; the omitted-callback compatibility control already passes.
